title: Oberonia monstruosa

The classification of Oberonia monstruosa includes the genus Oberonia, which is a group of terrestrial and epiphytic orchids. This genus is further classified under the subtribe Oberoniinae and tribe Cranichideae. Oberonia monstruosa is a rare and unusual species within this classification.
